writing.task1:
Dear Building Management
I am writing to report that the night-time façade cleaning happening last night, August 18, past midnight, caused significant disturbance. The noise made it very difficult to sleep, leaving many residents tired and affecting their work today. I kindly request that the cleaning schedule be revised to earlier hours and that noise reduction measures be considered to prevent such disruption in the future
Thank you for your understanding
writing.task2: I agrree. In my opinion, all internships should be paid. Paying interns ensures that students from all backgrounds can afford to gain work experience, not just those who can work for free. For example, a paid internship at a marketing firm allowed a student from a low-income family to support herself while learning valuable skill. Some may argue that unpaid internships offer opportunity for learning, but many talented students are excluded, making the experience less fair and inclusive
writing.task3: The chart show that all three study strategies helped students improve from 62 in  Week 1, but at different rate. Spaced Practice increased steadily by about 3 points per week, reaching 84 by week 8, the highest score. Mixed Practice grew by 2.5 points weekly, ending at 80, while Cramming rose more slowly at 2 points per week, finishing at 74. Overall, Spaced Practice was the most effective, as it gave the largest and most consistent improvement, so it is the recommended method for better long-term learning
